title: convolvulus subspathulatus
intro: Convolvulus subspathulatus, also known as the dwarf morning glory, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus subspathulatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical application, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
